---
title: "Evolved population: Relative growth rates"
---

## Introduction

This document analyses the mixed population experiment (transplant experiment) examining relative growth rates (based on frond counts) across different origin treatments and host environments.


### Load libraries

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lme4)
library(car)
library(plotrix)
library(ggpubr)
```

### Data import

```{r data-import, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
df <- read.table("data_mix.txt", sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
```

### Data preparation

```{r data-preparation, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
df$count_D0 <- as.numeric(df$count_D0)
df$count_w2 <- as.numeric(df$count_w2)

df$rel.count <- (log(df$count_w2) - log(df$count_D0)) / 14
```

### Summary statistics

```{r summary-statistics, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
mdata.plot <- df %>%
  group_by(origin_treatment, host_environment) %>%
  summarise(
    fitness_av = mean(rel.count, na.rm = TRUE),
    fitness_se = std.error(rel.count, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

### Relative growth rate (count)

```{r panel-a-count, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=6, fig.height=6}
px1 <- ggplot(mdata.plot, aes(
  x = host_environment, 
  y = fitness_av,
  color = origin_treatment,
  linetype = origin_treatment,
  group = origin_treatment
)) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = fitness_av - fitness_se, ymax = fitness_av + fitness_se),
    width = 0.15, linewidth = 0.9,
    position = position_dodge(0.4)
  ) +
  geom_point(
    position = position_dodge(0.4),
    size = 3
  ) +
  geom_line(
    position = position_dodge(0.4),
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Origin Treatment",
    values = c("control" = "#0072B2", "heated" = "#D55E00")
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(     
    name = "Origin Treatment",
    values = c("control" = "dashed", "heated" = "solid")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Relative growth rate in frond counts",
    x = "Host Environment",
    y = "Relative Growth Rate"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

px1
```
### Statistical analyses

#### Relative growth rate (count)

```{r stats-count, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
model_count <- lmer(rel.count ~ origin_treatment * host_environment + (1 | pond) + (1 | block), data = df)
Anova(model_count, test = "F")
summary(model_count)
```
